decisions.decision: Place greeting.ts at frontend/src/lib/greeting.ts as specified in the task, not in lib/utils/
alternatives_rejected: frontend/src/lib/utils/greeting.ts — matches existing convention but contradicts task spec

decisions.decision: Use @/ path alias in test imports to match existing test conventions
alternatives_rejected: Relative imports — inconsistent with existing tests

decisions.decision: Explicitly import describe/it/expect from 'vitest' to match format.test.ts pattern
alternatives_rejected: Relying on vitest globals — would work but breaks consistency with existing tests

decisions.decision: Use named export (export function greet) matching existing lib conventions

steps.task: Create frontend/src/lib/greeting.ts with exported greet(name: string): string function returning `Hello, ${name}!`
Create frontend/src/lib/greeting.test.ts with vitest tests covering basic name input
Run vitest to confirm tests pass
